Repository Layer¶

users¶

class src.repository.users.UserRepository(session: AsyncSession)[source]¶

Bases: object

Data access layer for User entities.

async confirmed_email(email: str) → None[source]¶

Mark the user’s email as confirmed.

async create_user(body: UserCreate, avatar: str | None = None) → User[source]¶

Create and persist a new user. First registered user gets the admin role.

async get_user_by_email(email: str) → User | None[source]¶

Return a user by email, or None if not found.

async get_user_by_username(username: str) → User | None[source]¶

Return a user by username, or None if not found.

async update_avatar_url(email: str, url: str) → User[source]¶

Update a user’s avatar URL and return the updated user.

async update_password(user: User, hashed_password: str) → None[source]¶

Update a user’s hashed password and clear the refresh token.

async update_refresh_token(user: User, token: str | None) → None[source]¶

Store or clear a user’s refresh token.

contacts¶

Contact repository — data access layer for Contact entities.

class src.repository.contacts.ContactRepository(session: AsyncSession)[source]¶

Bases: object

Data access layer for Contact entities.

async create_contact(body: ContactCreate, user: User) → Contact[source]¶

Create and persist a new contact for user.

Parameters:

  • body – Validated contact creation payload.

  • user – The owning user.

Returns:

The newly created Contact.

async delete_contact(contact_id: int, user: User) → Contact | None[source]¶

Delete a contact and return it, or None if not found.

Parameters:

  • contact_id – Primary key of the contact to delete.

  • user – The owning user.

Returns:

The deleted Contact or None.

async get_contact(contact_id: int, user: User) → Contact | None[source]¶

Return a single contact by ID that belongs to user, or None.

Parameters:

  • contact_id – Primary key of the contact.

  • user – The owning user.

Returns:

Contact object or None if not found.

async get_contacts(user: User, skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100) → list[Contact][source]¶

Return a paginated list of contacts belonging to user.

Parameters:

  • user – The owning user.

  • skip – Number of records to skip (offset).

  • limit – Maximum number of records to return.

Returns:

List of Contact objects.

async get_upcoming_birthdays(user: User) → list[Contact][source]¶

Return contacts with birthdays in the next 7 days.

Parameters:

user – The owning user.

Returns:

List of Contact objects with upcoming birthdays.

async search_contacts(user: User, query: str) → list[Contact][source]¶

Return contacts matching query in first name, last name, or email.

Parameters:

  • user – The owning user.

  • query – Case-insensitive search string.

Returns:

List of matching Contact objects.

async update_contact(contact_id: int, body: ContactUpdate, user: User) → Contact | None[source]¶

Update an existing contact and return it, or None if not found.

Parameters:

  • contact_id – Primary key of the contact to update.

  • body – Partial update payload (only set fields are applied).

  • user – The owning user.

Returns:

Updated Contact or None.
